productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Stripes Navy Blue Tie
description: A classic colour combination, this navy blue silk tie from Reid and Taylor comes with pink diagonal stripes that makes this a perfect addition to your formal wardrobe. Length: 150 cm Made of 100% silk for luxurious feel and light sheen Diagonal pink stripes for style One loop and brand badge on the inner of the broad tongue to hold the narrow tongue in place Tie care Dry clean only
